title: JAIL INFORMATION - 211info
text: DESCHUTES COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE JAIL INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates correctional facilities for adults in custody and supports families by helping them locate individuals within the corrections system. Offers both in-person and video visitation options, and processes bail and commissary transactions. 63333 W Highway 20 Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 317-3169 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Jail Information (541) 317-3169 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: County Correctional Facilities Prisoner Locator Services Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CENTRAL OREGON PARTNERSHIPS FOR YOUTH LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - SHERIFF'S OFFICE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - DEFLECTION DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DESCHUTES COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE
